title: γ-scaling at the edge of metastability: analytical anchor for Kuramoto and empirical cross-substrate program
description: Reference implementation and evidence bundle for the γ-program: a cost-complexity scaling law K(C) ~ C^(-gamma) with K = critical coupling, C = lambda_1(A). Analytical proof (Lemma 1) for the Kuramoto model on dense symmetric graphs with numerical verification gamma-hat = 0.9923 (95% CI [0.9811, 1.0032]). Cross-substrate empirical measurements across six substrates (zebrafish, HRV, EEG, Gray-Scott, Kuramoto simulation, BN-Syn) at the Empirical layer (Claim C-003). The cross-substrate γ-invariance conjecture is Conjectural (Claim C-004). See docs/CLAIM_BOUNDARY.md for the canonical claim boundary.
